CE1.justification: Acted on step 1 but then handed the user a four-part numbered interview plus an 'also' supplementary ask covering deploy record / dashboard / chat — multiple distinct loads to satisfy before progress.

CE2.justification: Status line is followed by an enumerated interview, then an 'also' block of optional sources, then a trailing summary of the remaining steps and final path — several stretches of restatement past what the task needed.

CE3.justification: Names both the current artifact path and the eventual destination ('projects/postmortems/2026-05-17-staging-rollback.md') with the runbook step as the why, in-band.

CE4.justification: Single timeline.md shell with explicit awaiting-input notes; interruption here leaves one self-describing placeholder with no orphans.
